resources.string: WordWise monitors your text input and fixes grammar when you use the ?fix command. Your text is processed privately using your own API key.
Get a free key at aistudio.google.com
Required to detect shortcuts in any app
Paste your Gemini API key here
Type ?fix at the end of your text in any app:
Before: i dont no how to spel\?fix
After: I don\'t know how to spell.
Works in any language \u2014 Swahili, French, Arabic, and more
Sentence and paragraph structure is always preserved
Invalid API key format. Get your key from aistudio.google.com
Find and enable WordWise in the list
✓ Key saved and encrypted on device
Please enter a valid API key
API quota reached. WordWise works best for short texts under 500 characters.\n\nCheck your usage at aistudio.google.com
API quota reached \u2014 try again in %1$d seconds.\n\nFor frequent use, check your quota at aistudio.google.com
API key rejected (error %1$d). Please check your key in WordWise settings.
Could not reach Gemini (%1$s). Shortcut removed, text unchanged.
No corrections needed \u2014 text looks good.
Large text detected \u2014 this may use significant API quota. Fixing anyway...
Short messages, sentences, and paragraphs. For long documents, break text into sections and fix each one separately.
Free tier: ~1,500 requests/day. Check usage at aistudio.google.com
Get a free API key at ollama.com/settings/keys
